title: axonopus ciliatifolius
intro: Axonopus ciliatifolius, also known as the ciliate beard grass or ciliate beard grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, particularly its rhizomes and roots, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits associated with Axonopus ciliatifolius include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Axonopus ciliatifolius is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
